name: WP-W1-schema: build the 8-table identity/tenancy/consent schema + scoped-repo enforcement
description: W1 (structural foundation, critical-path ROOT) — build the 8 target tables direct (person, organization, membership, subscription, guardianship, supportership, consent_grant, person_retain set) per docs/canon/identity/data-model.md §1 — no dual-model, no backfill — and enforce profileId on every scoped single-table read (F-032: createScopedRepository; parent-chain pattern where joins are needed). The schema and the per-table profileId scoping rule are the same data-model artifact and ship in lockstep. Depends on the full W0 hard gate (WP-W0-baseline + WI-549 + WI-550 + WI-551).
acceptanceCriteria: 8 tables present per data-model.md §1; every scoped single-table read goes through createScopedRepository(profileId); no unscoped raw db.select() on a scoped table. Findings: F-032 + build-item (schema). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W1-schema (commit 23d0c01ad)
riskImpact: M / risky — the foundational data model everything binds to.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W1-schema)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 → "WP-W1-schema" detail block @ commit 23d0c01ad (eduagent-build) — the frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001), materialized as WI-591 / WI-592.
Bundle rationale
The schema and the per-table profileId scoping rule are the same data-model artifact (docs/canon/identity/data-model.md §5.1) and ship in lockstep — scoping is meaningless without the tables.
Strategy
Build the 8 target tables direct (person, organization, membership, subscription, guardianship, supportership, consent_grant, person_retain set) — no dual-model, no backfill — and enforce profileId on every scoped single-table read (F-032: createScopedRepository; parent-chain pattern where joins are needed, per repo rules).
Scope
In: the 8 tables + scoped-repo wiring. Out: readers that consume them (later WPs).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
8 tables present per data-model.md §1.
Every scoped single-table read goes through createScopedRepository(profileId).
No unscoped raw db.select() on a scoped table.
Risk & blast radius
M / risky — the foundational data model everything binds to. Depends on the full W0 hard gate (WI-569 baseline + WI-549/550/551 patches).
